---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  ROKETSAN,Project Engineer (Candidate) , 2026


## Internships

1.  Firm TUSAŞ, position Project Engineer, 2025


# Projects

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Pilates
